AutoMesh.description: True if the frame object is to be automatically meshed by the program when the SAP analysis model is created.

AutoMeshAtPoints.description: If AutoMesh is True, the frame object is automatically meshed at intermediate joints along its length.

AutoMeshAtLines.description: If AutoMesh is True, the frame object is automatically meshed at intersections with other frames, area object edges, and solid object edges.

NumSegs.description: If AutoMesh is True, the minimum number of elements into which the frame object is automatically meshed. If zero, the number of elements is not checked when the automatic meshing is done.

AutoMeshMaxLength.description: If AutoMesh is True, the maximum length of auto meshed frame elements. If zero, the element length is not checked when automatic meshing is done.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
